e6a43ea877082823.author: Durga Rajasre B
e6a43ea877082823.text:
Had a really good experience with Sathya Agency while purchasing a phone.

We first contacted them on May 9 around 7:30 PM, and Mr. Rajesh, the manager, coordinated extremely well and helped us get the exact phone we were looking for along with a good discount.

The next day, we visited the store and completed the purchase smoothly. The overall customer service was excellent. They also provided us with a charger and gifted us Zebronics wireless headphones, which was a really nice gesture.

A special mention to Ms. Saraswathi, who assisted us at the store. She was very friendly, polite, and made the entire purchase experience comfortable and pleasant.

Overall, we are very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Sathya Agency, Thiruchendur for their customer support and professionalism.
